post.description: Reverts a subscription cancellation made by mistake. Only admins can perform this action. Restores subscription status to ACTIVA, clears fecha_termino, marks cancellation as voided, and creates a history record with change_type REVERSION.

Assigns one or more subscriptions to a child client within the same organization. The parent client must own the subscriptions, and the child client must be part of the same organization (sharing the same id_father or being a direct subsidiary of the parent).

400.description: Invalid request (empty subscription_ids, same parent/child, invalid relationship)

404.description: Parent client, child client, or subscriptions not found

post.description: Transfers one or more subscriptions from their current client to a different client. Creates a transfer log entry for each subscription. The operation is atomic.

supplier_id.description: Proveedor asociado (opcional). Útil para créditos con bancos como proveedores.

bank_account_id.description: ID de la cuenta bancaria origen (opcional si es efectivo)

is_total_payment.description: Indica si es un pago total (salda la tarjeta)

current_installment.description: Número de cuota actual (en la que va el crédito)

end_date.description: End date for the recurring rule (optional)
End date for the recurring rule (optional)

subscriptions_count.description: Number of subscriptions assigned to this child

visits_count.description: Number of billable visits assigned to this child

sales_count.description: Number of sales assigned to this child

total_uf.description: Total amount in UF for this child

total_clp.description: Total amount in CLP for this child

color_index.description: Index for color-coding in frontend (0, 1, 2, etc.)

subscriptions_count.description: Number of subscriptions directly under parent (no child assigned)

total_uf.description: Total amount in UF for direct subscriptions

total_clp.description: Total amount in CLP for direct subscriptions

fecha_generada.description: Date when this report was generated

direct_billing.description: Billing for subscriptions directly under parent (no child assigned)

grand_total_uf.description: Grand total in UF (all children + direct)

grand_total_clp.description: Grand total in CLP (all children + direct)

total_subscriptions_count.description: Total number of subscriptions across all children and direct

total_visits_count.description: Total number of visits across all children and direct

total_sales_count.description: Total number of sales across all children and direct

children_count.description: Number of child companies with billing

image_url.description: Image URL (Azure Blob Storage SAS URL)

usuario_id.description: User UUID who starts the execution

total_subs.description: Total amount for subscriptions in CLP

total_visits.description: Total amount for visits in CLP

total_device_sales.description: Total amount for device sales in CLP

subscriptions_by_plan.description: Breakdown of subscriptions by plan with individual proration

totalPlansProcessed.description: Total number of subscription plans processed

plansSkipped.description: Number of plans skipped due to critical price threshold

plansWithWarnings.description: Number of plans with suspicious prices (warnings)

source.description: Source of data: facturas_generadas or calculo_tiempo_real

example: SOSPECHOSO: Plan "Premium" (ID:123) tiene precio 50 UF - Verificar
warnings.description: Array of warning messages for suspicious or critical data issues

subscription_id.description: Subscription UUID (null = entire invoice). Deprecated: use subscription_ids.

subscription_ids.description: Array of subscription UUIDs for multi-subscription discounts

motivo_otro.description: Custom reason text (only when motivo is "Otro")

duracion_meses.description: Duration in months (1 = one-time, N = recurring)

subscription_ids.description: Array of subscription UUIDs for multi-subscription discounts

source_type.description: Tipo de origen: subscription, visit, sale, other

uf_value_at_creation.description: Valor UF al momento de creación

dte_type.description: Tipo de documento DTE: FACTURA o BOLETA
Tipo de documento DTE: FACTURA o BOLETA

sii_objected.description: Whether SII accepted with objections (Aceptado con Reparos)

billing_group_id.description: When provided, regenerate only the draft for this specific billing group

override_emails.description: Lista de emails alternativos para enviar (multi destinatario)

custom_body_html.description: HTML personalizado del cuerpo del email

reason.description: Motivo de la referencia (requerido para NC/ND)

reference_code.description: Código de referencia — solo para NC/ND ("1", "2", "3")

reason.description: Motivo de la referencia (requerido para NC/ND)

reference_code.description: Código de referencia — solo para NC/ND ("1", "2", "3")

description_template.description: Plantilla de descripción para la línea de factura. Acepta {mes}, {año}, {patente}.

subscription_detail_ids.description: IDs de suscripciones a asignar a este grupo

description_template.description: Plantilla de descripción para la línea de factura. Acepta {mes}, {año}, {patente}.

subscription_detail_ids.description: IDs de suscripciones a asignar a este grupo

template.description: Plantilla de glosa para facturas. Admite tokens: {mes}, {año}, {cliente}

currentMonth.description: Current month (1-12). Months after this are projected.

projectionMethod.description: Projection method used for future months

sections.description: Full income statement sections with ingresos, costos, gastos, and results

phone_numbers.description: List of phone numbers (MSISDN) to query

totalDownloadGb.description: Total descarga (RX) en GB — datos recibidos por el dispositivo

totalUploadGb.description: Total subida (TX) en GB — datos enviados por el dispositivo (telemetría GPS)

avgPerDevice.description: Promedio de consumo por dispositivo en MB

devicesOverLimit.description: Cantidad de dispositivos que exceden el 100% del límite esperado

topRiskClients.description: Top 5 clientes en riesgo (>80% del límite)

monthOverMonth.description: Porcentaje de cambio vs mes anterior (negativo = reducción)

lastUpdated.description: Fecha y hora de última actualización (ISO 8601)

startMonth.description: Mes inicial en formato YYYY-MM (opcional, default: hace 6 meses)

endMonth.description: Mes final en formato YYYY-MM (opcional, default: mes actual)

totalConsumption.description: Consumo total del mes en GB

expectedConsumption.description: Consumo esperado del mes en GB

deviceCount.description: Cantidad de dispositivos activos en el mes

avgPerDevice.description: Promedio de consumo por dispositivo en MB

overLimitCount.description: Cantidad de dispositivos que excedieron el límite (>100%)

phone_number.description: Phone number (MSISDN) of the SIM to modify

phone_numbers.description: List of phone numbers (MSISDN) to modify (max 100)

action.description: Action to perform on all SIMs

search_term.description: Search term (last 4+ digits of phone number)

connection_status.description: Device connection status from Emnify: ONLINE, OFFLINE, ATTACHED

country.description: Country name where the device is currently connected

pdp_context.description: Active PDP context (session) details. Null when device is offline.

status.description: Data source status: live (fresh from API), cached (from DB), no_sim, no_endpoint, error

data_rx.description: Array of [time, bytes] pairs for RX

data_tx.description: Array of [time, bytes] pairs for TX

enabled.description: Whether to enable (true) or disable (false) the endpoint

errors.description: List of validation errors if applicable

command.description: Command to send to device as key-value pairs

description.example: Boton de emergencia para activar alerta
Botón de emergencia para activar alerta

currencyId.description: ID de la moneda (1=UF por defecto)

isUniversal.description: Indica si es un accesorio universal (compatible con todos los GPS)

gpsModelIds.description: IDs de los modelos GPS compatibles

currencyId.description: ID de la moneda (1=UF por defecto)

isUniversal.description: Indica si es un accesorio universal (compatible con todos los GPS)

gpsModelIds.description: IDs de los modelos GPS compatibles

installation.description: Installation visit data (optional, can be added later)

visible_to_client.description: Whether visible to client in PDF

gps_name.description: GPS model name (snapshot for historical record)

monthly_price.description: Monthly price per unit in UF

setup_price.description: Setup/installation price per unit in UF

public_notes.description: Notes visible to client in PDF
Notes visible to client in PDF

shared_mailbox_id.description: ID de la bandeja compartida para enviar desde

send_mode.description: Modo de envio desde bandeja compartida

ai_generated_subject.description: Asunto generado por IA (para feedback RAG)

ai_generated_body.description: Cuerpo generado por IA (para feedback RAG)

shared_mailbox_id.description: ID de la bandeja compartida para responder desde ella (si aplica)

send_mode.description: Modo de envío al responder desde bandeja compartida

template_name.description: Nombre del template aprobado en Meta

days.description: Número de días a sincronizar (vacío = todo el histórico)

department_id.description: Department ID this position belongs to
Department ID this position belongs to

current_salary.description: Salary as string (will be converted to Decimal)

plate.description: Normalized license plate (6 uppercase alphanumeric chars)

lastQueryDate.description: Last query date from data source

ufValueAtSale.description: Valor de la UF al momento de la venta

installmentsCount.description: Número de cuotas (requerido si paymentMode es INSTALLMENTS)

createdBy.description: ID del usuario que crea la venta

ufValueAtSale.description: Valor de la UF al momento de la venta

activate.description: Si se deben activar las subscripciones inmediatamente

fecha_inicio.description: Fecha de inicio de la subscripción (solo si activate=true)

item_plan_map.description: Mapa de itemId → planId para asignar plan a cada item del envío

subscription_frequency_id.description: ID de la frecuencia de subscripción

child_client_id.description: ID del child client (grupo) al que asignar las subscripciones. Si no se envía, se usa el client de la orden.
